cv_resume: Fullstack developer with experience in Web and Mobile applications using React and its frameworks, building APIs with Node.js using Express or Nest.js, and using cloud services such as AWS and Google Cloud. Able to support maintenance and development of systems built with Java, C#, or Clojure. I enjoy learning different technologies and ways to improve productivity and code quality, and I like being creative and proposing ways to improve the development process through reports and automated tests.
experience_harmat_text: Online platform for pest control service management, with visit scheduling, inventory control, and billing. I worked as a fullstack developer building forms, interactive maps, work order issuance, PDF reports, payment integration, and email notifications.
experience_harmat_tech: NextJS, TailwindCSS, Ant Design, .Net, C#, Docker, Google Maps API, Stripe, AWS.
experience_accourdous_text: Online platform for rental, buying, and selling properties, with contract issuance and property listing. I worked as a frontend developer building dynamic forms, contract editing and PDF generation, API request optimization and caching, and the automated test structure.
experience_cef_text: Online platform to manage students and class activities, with a professor dashboard, blog section, and course payments.
experience_cef_tech: NextJS, TailwindCSS, MaterialUI, Django and Stripe.
experience_westpoint_text: Software company from the United Kingdom with a development team based in Brazil, providing software development services for third-party companies. I worked on several client projects, mainly on frontend development with ReactJS and NextJS and mobile apps with React Native, while also contributing to backend development with NodeJS and AWS.
experience_collums_text: Online platform used to manage aesthetic clinics with more than 11 franchise clients, including appointment scheduling, online consultations, certificate and invoice generation, and product stock management. I worked as a fullstack developer creating new features, fixing bugs, and improving performance. I also helped build a second API for third-party frontend usage and supported onboarding new clients, including server and database setup and data migration with custom scripts.
experience_collums_tech: ReactJS, MaterialUI, NodeJS, Jest, Express, Mongodb, Docker, AWS services.
experience_talentId_text: Online platform integrated with ChatGPT to evaluate and rank candidate resumes based on specific criteria. It also provides technical tests through quizzes and generates detailed performance reports with strengths, improvement areas, and an overall score. I contributed to frontend development for resume evaluation, technical tests, and reports, and to backend API development and OpenAI prompt integration.
experience_talentId_tech: NextJS, MatineUI, OpenAI API integration, and AWS services (lambda, S3, SQS, DynamoDB, etc.).
experience_vouchio_text: Android/iOS app focused on security and identity verification, allowing users to use smartphones with smart locks and alarm systems for homes or vehicles. It can also verify user identity through facial recognition or fingerprint and send real-time alerts for suspicious activity.
experience_vouchio_tech: React Native, Storybook, Styled Components, Android Studio, Xcode, Java, ClojureScript.
experience_vintage_text: Online platform for wine acquisition management with features such as wine registration, inventory management, and report generation synchronized in real time with Google Docs spreadsheets. I worked as a fullstack developer on screens, Google API integration, and API development/documentation using AWS services.
experience_vintage_tech: ReactJS, MantineUI, Google Docs APIs, and AWS services (lambda, S3, SQS, DynamoDB, etc.).
experience_quarx_text: Chrome extension that lets users create interactive guides to teach workflows on websites, with features like element highlighting, popups, arrows, and explanatory text. I worked on frontend development, Chrome Web Store publishing, and an AWS-based API to store guide data.
experience_quarx_tech: ReactJS, Styled Components, Chrome APIs, and AWS services (lambda, S3, DynamoDB, etc.).
experience_website_text: Company marketing website built to present services and contact information for potential clients. I contributed to the design process with screens and components in Figma, frontend implementation with NextJS and TailwindCSS, and deployment setup with AWS Cloudfront.
